ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the document (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the document needs to be reviewed or renewed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Physical location of the document file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES document_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the author belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being acted upon */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, modified, approved) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action took place */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_audit_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was approved */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the document was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Compliance, Operations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id")
)
